_comment: Cube corner bevel: 3 edges meeting at v_0, width 0.2, 3 segments (odd). Expected fail until odd-seg M_ADJ is implemented: vibe3d's useMAdj rejects odd seg, so the cap falls back to a seg=1 N-gon (3 BVs + 2 interior points) instead of Blender's full 12-vert sphere-octant grid with central triangle. See source/bevel.d:777 and the 'bevel_build_rings odd branch' TODO above it.
